description_long: This is a Soviet-era military jet aircraft with a streamlined, light gray fuselage and swept-back mid-mounted wings. The airplane features prominent red star insignias on the wings and tail, as well as the number '01' painted on the forward fuselage. The nose is equipped with three visible gun barrels, indicating its combat role, and the cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy situated just behind the nose. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a conventional arrangement. The landing gear is partially visible, with two main wheels and a nose wheel, suggesting a tricycle configuration.
description: A light gray Soviet military jet with swept mid-wings, red star markings, and a gun-equipped nose. Features an enclosed cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the three gun barrels on the nose, the cockpit canopy, and red star markings on the wings and tail.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the red star on the tail fin.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the tail assembly, wing sweep, and the underside of the wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the nose guns, cockpit, and the number '01' on the fuselage, along with wing and tail markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated within the fuselage, with no external nacelles visible.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, partially extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy positioned just behind the nose.
